calendar.matters:
Osc For Name Change Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Aug-18-2009 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an adult only.
The OSC hearing for Change of Name of the Minor is continued to Aug. 18, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218 for notice and proof of service to the Minor's father.

Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Petitioner: Jameelah Hoskins, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Jayde Anyce Murff.
Decree signed in open court.
